text: The researcher published the results of the experiment in a prestigious journal last month.
The bridge was constructed by a team of engineers using reinforced concrete.
Maria gave her brother a birthday present at the family gathering on Saturday.
The window shattered during the storm without anyone touching it.
The chef prepared an elaborate five-course dinner for the visiting diplomats in the hotel kitchen.
Several ancient artifacts were discovered beneath the temple by the archaeological team.
The students organized a protest march through the city center demanding educational reform.
The medication was administered to the patient intravenously by the attending nurse.
The ice melted rapidly under the intense afternoon sun.
The company hired three new developers to build the mobile application using agile methodology.
